title: CarettaProvenance
description: Provenance metadata emitted by every caretta agent workflow run. Stored as a JSON comment <!-- caretta:provenance {...} --> in the GitHub issue or PR body.

agent.description: Agent CLI used for the run (e.g. "claude", "codex", "gemini").

model_id.description: Model identifier as configured in caretta.toml at the time of the run.

prompt_version.description: Hex-encoded 64-bit hash of the full prompt text, uniquely identifying the prompt version used.

input_digest.description: Hex-encoded 64-bit hash of the issue title and body, identifying the inputs consumed by the run.

run_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the agent run started (e.g. "2026-05-15T10:30:00Z").
